item.title: Someone messaged me to tell me to leave America, and accused me of being a terrorist...
item.description:
This person not only thinks all Etsy shops are US-based but also wasted time accusing me of being a terrorist based on my silly needlework. The thing is: I live in Europe.
This is clearly stated in my shop lol https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com
How can someone be so pissed and feel threatened by this little cutie?
The best part is: I never specified a government, but the person automatically assumed I was talking about the USA.
Lots of people around the world aren’t happy with their current governments, so I make this piece in other languages too. It’s just a sassy needlework of a cat holding a “meowlotov” cocktail, not an anarchist manifesto. Wishing you all a great week ahead!
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

22
23
24
25 BOM BOKO
#26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: The absolutely wonderful art of @Patricbates I hope he doesn't mind my sharing it.
#27 Man Tax: Kayne Lawton
Happy birthday to me, for a few more hours, anyway. I old. “There is nothing like looking, if you want to find something. You certainly usually find something, if you look, but it is not always quite the something you were after.” ― J.R.R. Tolkien, The Hobbit, or There and Back Again I try to keep my posts "good vibe zones". So, instead of finding the one thing in here you don't like and commenting on it, maybe let it go, don't comment on it and find something that you do like. Love you long time. So, I made a discord server so you guys can donate memes to the museum for future CCC posts. I don't want to run out! Also, we can hang out, play some trivia, talk about movies & tv and, apparently, plucked chicken buttholes. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ

item.title: RIP Tom Lehrer, who played a prank so sneaky nobody realized it for sixty years
item.description:
Here’s the song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qU_j5cQ2sfQ
Here’s the paper: https://media.defense.gov/2021/Jul/14/2002762807/-1/-1/0/GAMBLERS-RUIN.PDF/GAMBLERS-RUIN.PDF
Also, Tom Lehrer is credited with inventing the modern Jell-O shot. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jello_shot#History
Here’s that song: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV11OefIOgM https://bsky.app/profile/opalescentopal.bsky.social/post/3luxxx27nos23 Fookin’ legend.

item.title: Anne Frank was photographed with her sister Margot at the beach in Zandvoort in the Netherlands in 1940.Margot was the older sister, quiet and serious, and while Anne’s diary became one of the most read accounts of the Holocaust
item.description: Anne Frank was photographed with her sister Margot at the beach in Zandvoort in the Netherlands in 1940. Margot was the older sister, quiet and serious, and while Anne’s diary became one of the most read accounts of the Holocaust, Margot also kept a diary of her own during their time in hiding. Sadly, no trace of Margot’s diary was ever found after the war. Margot, like Anne, was deported after the family’s hiding place was discovered in 1944. The sisters were eventually sent to the Bergen Belsen concentration camp, where they both perished of illness and starvation in early 1945, just weeks before the camp was liberated. On April 5, 1944, Anne Frank wrote in her diary: “When I write I can shake off all my cares. My sorrow disappears, my spirits are revived! But, and that’s a big question, will I ever write be able to write something great, will I ever become a journalist or a writer?“
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Update to an update for the update (check my previous posts)
item.description: That went a bit faster than expected though the whole process of suing them will probably gonna last long. Especially that they are getting charged up the ass for their scams. Apparently they cheated a lot of people around in many different ways. Well this is about to end. I'm doing kinda ok, all this costs a lot and I am barely scraping by but I am scraping by. Couple months probably till I actually work myself back but doing all I can. I'm working two jobs today so might be very slow to respond to comments until I come back home at night

item.title: California GOP Candidate Calls Auschwitz a “Solution,” Gets Only Platform He Deserves: None
item.description:
“* **** ** **** ****** *** ***’* *** ** **,” said Langford, a wannabe nazi piece of dog shit, who would throw your family in prison or in front of a firing squad if they disagree with his fascist ideology. “**’** **** ** **** ***, * ******* ** *** ** *******.”
“Alpine 6 Action News does not platform fascists. We do not present “both sides” of genocide. We do not “contextualize” calls for state-run murder factories. Kyle Langford is a fascist. Not a “provocateur,” not a “populist,” not a “fringe conservative.” He is a man running for office on a platform that includes the mass incarceration and murder of vulnerable people. His speech is not a policy disagreement. It is a threat. And like every fascist before him, he’s using democracy only long enough to dismantle it.” - It’s around this point I’d say this article is satire, and while AP6 does post almost entirely satire, I feel the usual tags have no place here. The only platform this nazi will get is the one built to support the gallows where he shall hang from his hubris, if not a rough spun rope. https://alpine6.com/2025/07/28/california-gop-candidate-calls-auschwitz-a-solution-gets-only-platform-he-deserves-none/
item.dc:creator: ItsActuallyDavidNow

item.title: RHM + random impressions
item.description:
Happy Monday everyone! Today I'm going to share some random impressions of my time in Europe.
A yummy dish I had at a georgian (country, not state) restaurant. its breadlike dough and in the center cheese, spinach and egg. Its called Khachapuri. And it also looks a lil bit like a vagina xD
A muslim couple I'm friends with invited me over to their place and the food just wouldnt stop coming. I didnt take pics of the previous "courses" but this was dessert. Mind you, we were 3 people. And it was all SO GOOD.
A beautiful tiramisu my roommates sister made when we went to their garden. Damn its all food pics isnt it lol
Alright, then Im commited. Its all food. This is from a german "fast food" chain. Not rly like the fast food I know from the US (though ofc they do also have BK and McD in Germany) but very healthy instead. a bowl like this is about 12€ (14$). And I had purple hair then haha
I know the pic doesnt look like much but why is this not a thing in the US? Its called "Bienenstich" and is a cake filled with a kind of vanilla pudding. its topped with caramel and almonds. SO GOOD <3
Sushi in Oslo <3
Ramen in Oslo :)
Bread bowl, its filled with a hearty goulash and the core (the yellow thing next to it) is taken out and drenched in garlic butter. You know, when life is lame and you feel like going out with a bang
German Kaiserschmarn (Im not even sure if I spell it correctly. or if its german. could be austrian??) its pancakes, with caramelized sugar, torn apart, served with vanilla ice cream and pears. I could eat it every day...
Another picture that doesnt look like much but omg its so yummy. Its hungarian and called Langos, its deep fried dough topped with sour cream, cheese and garlic. Its a staple on german christmas markets <3
A fish dish in Gdansk (Poland) in a famous fish restaurant. Poland is super affordable, so I ate like a queen on the budget of a maid lol
The dessert was a cherry made of a fluffy vanilla cream covered in red sauce. On the inside were fruits and chocolate.
This plate/soup ratio haha
Authentic polish pierogies in Gdansk
A lovely omelette in Germany <3
A strawberry cheesecake one of my roommates made. Its with white chocolate and no-bake. Absolutely divine, but super heavy
Another cake my roommate made. It was actually made of 50+ pancakes (the thin german pancakes) with different creams in between. What a monstrosity. But so yummy.
Here is what it looked on the inside. Not very appealing I know. But sometimes you cant judge a book by its cover lol
A cake my roommates sister made. its called "russischer zupfkuchen" which im not even sure how to translate properly. but its a bit like cheesecake but with chunks of chocolate cake baked in.
German Baumkuchen <3 So good... This one is storebought though.
Raclette <3 I think its from switzerland. Not the best picture, but I wanted to include it :) On the top you fry various things like bacon, mushrooms, onion etc and on the bottom you have little pans you put your raclette cheese in to melt it. Its a very social thing and takes a while, so its done at family get togethers and such.
German drinking culture is not for the weak lol
Crashing at 4am drunk at McDs.. Just to show its not all healthy and fancy over here haha
Breakfast at a beautiful place thats actually a bookstore, and they have a piano for anyone to sit down and play. Very cute <3
Okay thats a bit of a strange one. This is actually made for cheese. Its called tete-de-moine? I think. Which translated to monks head iirc. The blade rotates and shaves off super thin layers of cheese which crumple and fold to little blossoms. It melts right on the tongue. But my friend had the idea to melt chocolate and put it on there. It actually worked lol and we shared it between 5 people with fruit.
School cantina food in germany
Potato thing at a festival, it looks better than it was. Kinda dry and super salty
Haxe at a bavarian restaurant. Its the leg of a cow I believe, and has a super crunchy crust. Heavy. But super yummy....
Cat tax <3 Yup, I love food.

item.title: We are the bad place
item.description: The current Administration is held bent on making a perceived enemy out of nothing. That they're abandoning United States citizens for the bigoted Playbook they're running Front page. So my living situation is not exactly stable. Recovering from homelessness. And that's my phone has made it illegal to be homeless. I'm a disabled combat veteran, and my wife is terminally ill. The programs that I moved across the country for got shut down due to lack of fun and thanks to the executive order written on January 20th. I'm tired of almost getting there and then getting knocked right back on my ass. They've also made it possible for creditors to start putting things back on reports, even though it dropped off more than 8 years ago. My credit has tanked randomly and all the work I did for the last 5 years has gone out the window. They quite literally are trying to make it impossible for anybody to survive. Especially if you have a left-leaning bias. I'm so very tired of all this. I don't know when I serve this country for. Because this is certainly not the country that I once believed in. Depressed and not sure how much longer I want to stay on this ride
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #178
item.description: Clearance Sale on Democracy Trumpworld is a protection racket where loyalty buys immunity, dissent gets crushed. He forced foreign leaders to negotiate at his golf course under threat, then handed a judgeship to his criminal defense lawyer. That nominee is now under two whistleblower complaints for telling DOJ staff to ignore court orders. And while billionaires get tax cuts, social programs for the rest of us are gutted. No wonder Trump’s approval has tanked down to 37%. This is what it costs to sell out a democracy. And the bill is coming due. Don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-eu-trade-deal 2. https://go.govbrief.today/cambodia-thailand-peace-talks 3. https://go.govbrief.today/paul-biden-fauci-pardon 4. https://go.govbrief.today/new-whistleblower-bove-nomination Yesterday's Most Popular - https://go.govbrief.today/doge-ai-cut-regulations Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-approval-drops-again Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: One of the USAmerican Dictator's Top Men Is Assassinated
item.description:
NOTE: The below is an excerpt from Sinclair Lewis' IT CAN'T HAPPEN HERE. Mary is the eldest daughter of the novel's hero, Doremus Jessup. Swan is the man who is responsible for ordering the murder of Mary's late husband.  ***** At the field, as [Mary Greenhill] had been informed he would, District Commissioner Effingham Swan was boarding his big official cabin plane for a flight presumably into New England. He was tall; a distinguished, military-looking, polo-suggesting dignitary in masterfully simple blue-serge with just a light flying-helmet. A dozen yes-men buzzed about him—secretaries, bodyguards, a chauffeur, a couple of county commissioners, educational directors, labor directors—their hats in their hands, their smiles on their faces, their souls wriggling with gratitude to him for permitting them to exist. He snapped at them a good deal and bustled. As he mounted the steps to the cabin (Mary thought of “Casey Jones” and smiled), a messenger on a tremendous motorcycle blared up with the last telegrams. There seemed to be half a hundred of the yellow envelopes, Mary marveled. He tossed them to the secretary who was humbly creeping after him. The door of the viceregal coach closed on the Commissioner, the secretary, and two bodyguards lumpy with guns. It was said that in his plane Swan had a desk that had belonged to Hitler, and before him to Marat. To Mary, who had just lifted herself up into the cockpit, a mechanic cried, admiringly pointing after Swan’s plane as it lurched forward, “Gee, what a grand guy that is—Boss Swan. I hear where he’s flying down to Washington to chin with the Chief this morning—gee, think of it, with the Chief!” “Wouldn’t it be awful if somebody took a shot at Mr. Swan and the Chief? Might change all history,” Mary shouted down. “No chance of that! See those guards of his? Say, they could stand off a whole regiment—they could lick Walt Trowbridge and all the other Communists put together!” “I guess that’s so. Nothing but God shooting down from heaven could reach Mr. Swan.” “Ha, ha! That’s good! But couple days ago I heard where a fellow was saying he figured out God had gone to sleep.” “Maybe it’s time for Him to wake up!” said Mary, and raised her hand. Her plane had a top of two hundred and eighty-five miles an hour—Swan’s golden chariot had but two hundred and thirty. She was presently flying above and a little behind him. His cabin plane, which had seemed huge as the Queen Mary when she had looked up at its wingspread on the ground, now seemed small as a white dove, wavering above the patchy linoleum that was the ground. She drew from the pockets of her flying-jacket the three Mills hand grenades she had managed to steal from the school yesterday afternoon. She had not been able to get away with any heavier bomb. As she looked at them, for the first time she shuddered; she became a thing of warmer blood than a mere attachment to the plane, mechanical as the engine. “Better get it over before I go ladylike,” she sighed, and dived at the cabin plane. No doubt her coming was unwelcome. Neither Death nor Mary Greenhill had made a formal engagement with Effingham Swan that morning; neither had telephoned, nor bargained with irritable Secretaries, nor been neatly typed down on the great lord’s schedule for his last day of life. In his dozen offices, in his marble home, in council hall “and royal reviewing-stand, his most precious excellence was guarded with steel. He could not be approached by vulgarians like Mary Greenhill—save in the air, where emperor and vulgarian alike are upheld only by toy wings and by the grace of God. Three times Mary maneuvered above his plane and dropped a grenade. Each time it missed. The cabin plane was descending, to land, and the guards were shooting up at her. “Oh well!” she said, and dived bluntly at a bright metal wing. In her last ten seconds she thought how much the wing looked like the zinc washboard which, as a girl, she had seen used by Mrs. Candy’s predecessor—now what was her name?—Mamie or something. And she wished she had spent more time with David the last few months. And she noticed that the cabin plane seemed rather rushing up at her than she down at it. The crash was appalling. It came just as she was patting her parachute and rising to leap out—too late. All she saw was an insane whirligig of smashed wings and huge engines that seemed to have been hurled up into her face. […] After dinner, in Lorinda’s new tea room, in an aged house which was now empty of guests for the winter except for the constant infestation of whimpering refugees, Lorinda, knitting, made her first mention of the dead Mary. “I suppose your sister did intend to kill Swan, eh?” “I don’t know. The Corpos didn’t seem to think so. They gave her a big military funeral.” “Well, of course, they don’t much care to have assassinations talked about and maybe sort of become a general habit. I agree with your father. I think that, in many cases, assassinations are really rather unfortunate—a mistake in tactics. No. Not good. Oh, by the way, Sissy, I think I’m going to get your father out of concentration camp.” “What?” Lorinda had none of the matrimonial moans of Emma; she was as business-like as ordering eggs. “Yes. I tried everything. I went to see Tasbrough, and that educational fellow, Peaseley. Nothing doing. They want to keep Doremus in. But that rat, Aras Dilley, is at Trianon as guard now. I’m bribing him to help your father escape. We’ll have the man here for Christmas, only kind of late, and sneak him into Canada.” “Oh!” said Sissy. A few days afterward, reading a coded New Underground telegram which apparently dealt with the delivery of furniture, Lorinda shrieked, “Sissy! All you-know-what has busted loose! In Washington! Lee Sarason has deposed Buzz Windrip and grabbed the dictatorship!” “Oh!” said Sissy. ***** “List of Most Commonly Challenged Books in the United States” https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_most_commonly_challenged_books_in_the_United_States George Orwell: 1984 (Free Download) https://www.globalgreyebooks.com/nineteen-eighty-four-ebook.html Sinclair Lewis: It Can’t Happen Here https://www.fadedpage.com/showbook.php?pid=20171242 FREE eBook: DANTE’S DIVINE COMEDY: A RETELLING IN PROSE https://www.smashwords.com/books/view/238180 The Book of Good Deeds 1914-1918 Collected and Edited with a Foreword by Bernhard Diebold TRANSLATED BY HELLMUT AND LETITIA LEHMANN-HAUPT (PDF) https://web.seducoahuila.gob.mx/biblioweb/upload/bernhard-diebold-s-the-book-of-good-deeds-1914-1918%20(1).pdf FREE Anecdote Books and Retellings of Classic Literature https://www.smashwords.com/profile/view/bruceb SOME SOURCES FOR FREE EBOOKS http://johnstoniatexts.x10host.com (Many FREE Downloadable Translations) https://www.poetryintranslation.com (Many FREE Downloadable Translations) https://www.globalgreyebooks.com https://www.gutenberg.org https://gutenberg.ca/index.html https://www.fadedpage.com https://freeditorial.com https://www.classicallibrary.org/index.htm https://www.planetebook.com https://onlinebooks.library.upenn.edu https://www.exclassics.com https://standardebooks.org https://www.wikibooks.org
South Park Pro-Trump PSA (for Mature Audiences) https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Afetnw70S04 LegalEagle: “Trump Sued Wall Street Journal Over Epstein Files (And It's Crap)” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fg7yTKX5xxo&list=TLPQMjQwNzIwMjX9FZBCbh8Bgw&index=2 Professor Gerdes Explains: “Azerbaijan President's Stark Warning to UA: NEVER ACCEPT OCCUPATION” https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YFivijmGVEM Defense of Ukraine https://x.com/DefenceU/ CONTENT CONTROLS “Content Controls will allow you to see fewer posts from certain topics or tags while you browse Imgur.” https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26509094934171-Content-Controls HOW DO I MUTE OR BLOCK AN IMGUR USER? https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26508943104667-How-do-I-mute-or-block-a-user# HOW TO TAG YOUR POSTS Tags will help some people find your posts and other people avoid your posts. https://help.imgur.com/hc/en-us/articles/26511767487771-How-to-Tag CHECK TO SEE IF A SITE IS SAFE “Google’s Safe Browsing technology examines billions of URLs per day looking for unsafe websites. Every day, we discover thousands of new unsafe sites, many of which are legitimate websites that have been compromised. When we detect unsafe sites, we show warnings on Google Search and in web browsers. You can search to see whether a website is currently dangerous to visit.” https://transparencyreport.google.com/safe-browsing/search NOTE: Google keeps track of everything you search, including when you search on this site. Despite that, I use this site. FROM Mirrormancer: Saving things from the memory hole is good, and here's some tools for you and others to use for that. While a good ol printscreen grab will suffice, I like to use Greenshot to take snapshots of everything for documentation purposes. Been getting a LOT of use out of it over the last few months. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greenshot For documenting sites, I like to use ( archive.is ) to make backups + it'’s also good for bypassing paywalls. Example: https://archive.is/CHouq CONTACT ELECTED OFFICIALS https://www.usa.gov/elected-officials “Staying Safe While Protesting & Organizing” (PDF) https://static1.squarespace.com/static/6547d46ce0be13435001c0ad/t/68027264c50ab52ca94d5a89/1744990820280/Staying+Safe+While+Protesting.pdf 50 PROTESTS. 50 STATES. 1 MOVEMENT https://www.fiftyfifty.one MAYDAY MOVEMENT https://maydaymovementUSA.org GENERAL STRIKE USA https://generalstrikeus.com INDIVISIBLE https://indivisible.org MOBILIZE https://www.mobilize.us RESISTBOT is a chatbot that turns your texts into faxes, postal mail, or emails to your representatives in minutes. https://resist.bot KICK OUT THE CLOWNS: Women’s March https://action.womensmarch.com/calendars/kick-out-the-clowns?akid=22525.3568445.fS0dJz&filter%5Blocation%5D=10023&page=1&rd=1&t=2 MoveOn https://front.moveon.org In a MAGA society filled with acts of performative cruelty, which are often preceded/followed by prayers, it is a victory to be kind. In a MAGA society filled with incompetent leaders, it is a victory to avoid despair and alcoholism and drug abuse. In a MAGA society filled with acts of performative and/or other stupidity, it is a victory to be well-read and well-educated. In a MAGA society filled with badly lived lives, it is a victory to live a well-lived life. Live your life so fully and authentically that gay men will dress up like you in PRIDE parades. PUNK ROCK LOSER https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:s6ialkt7aqipmlcsoutmmoju THE INTELLECTUALIST NEWS FEED https://theintellectualist.com 58 Greatest Pride Songs and LGBTQ+ Anthems for Your Playlist https://www.goodhousekeeping.com/life/entertainment/g32947794/lgbt-pride-songs-anthems/ The 100 Greatest LGBTQ+ Anthems of All Time Here's a countdown of the songs that define queer culture. https://www.billboard.com/lists/lgbtq-anthems-queer-pride-songs/ NON-VIOLENT PROTESTS WORK! (90 seconds) It will take time and more effort, but we will prevail. https://www.facebook.com/reel/1273458134112664 COMMITTEE for a RESPONSIBLE FEDERAL BUDGET https://www.crfb.org SNOPES (Fact Checker) https://www.snopes.com LIST OF FACT-CHECKING WEBSITES https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_fact-checking_websites NON-LEGACY MEDIA Brian Tyler Cohen https://www.youtube.com/@briantylercohen https://bsky.app/profile/briantylercohen.bsky.social Glenn Kerschner https://www.youtube.com/@GlennKirschner2 https://bsky.app/profile/glennkirschner.bsky.social Marc Elias https://www.youtube.com/c/DemocracyDocket https://bsky.app/profile/marcelias.bsky.social https://www.democracydocket.com Paul Krugman Substack https://paulkrugman.substack.com Timothy Synder Substack https://snyder.substack.com Robert Reich Substack https://robertreich.substack.com/p/where-the-hell-is-the-moderate-middle Garrison Keillor Substack https://garrisonkeillor.substack.com/p/a-few-last-words-about-the-maga-man Andrew Tobias https://andrewtobias.com Letters from an American: Heather Cox Richardson Substack https://heathercoxrichardson.substack.com Civil Discourse with Joyce Vance https://joycevance.substack.com Gov Brief Today https://govbrief.today PROGRESS ACTION FUND https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJy-6_Zq04smZ3iUbQntrPg LEGAL EAGLE https://www.youtube.com/@LegalEagle ABOVE THE LAW https://abovethelaw.com/category/biglaw/ AMERICANS FOR TAX FAIRNESS ACTION FUND https://atfactionfund.org
Above: An infant in an iron lung.
item.dc:creator: oukid

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: Anything that make MY cult leader look bad MUST be fake!
item.description: They ain't called the poorly educated for nothing.
item.dc:creator: ManoloBIahnik

item.title: Everything makes the front page...
item.description: The front page is turning into a place that all posts cycle past as fast as they can cram ads in it. I'm on firefox so I don't see them, but still... I go do something like watch youtube or netflix then get bored and open imgur, it's a cycle of me being dumb.
item.dc:creator: fastjeff
